# Linux Freelancing Training & IT Support in Singapore 🇸🇬

School of Freelancing delivers live, online instructor-led Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support to students and businesses across Singapore — no local office required, priced in USD.

## Singapore Training & Support Overview

### Training for Singapore-Based Freelancers

Learn hands-on Linux server administration, DevOps, VoIP, and AI-platform skills through live instructor-led sessions scheduled to work with Singapore time zones, then apply them on Guru, Freelancer, and Upwork.

[Browse all training →](/freelancing-training/)

### Remote IT Support for Singapore Businesses

Get fast, secure remote support for Linux servers, cloud infrastructure, VoIP systems, and AI platforms — billed in USD with clear, fixed-scope pricing.

[Browse all support services →](/linux-ai-services/)

## Why Work With Us From Singapore

- All training and support is delivered online — no travel or on-site visit needed
- Pricing quoted and billed in USD, matching what you see on our training and support pages
- 24/7 response on Telegram and WhatsApp, with an average reply time of about an hour
- Flexible scheduling to overlap with Singapore business hours across time zones
- Training and support relevant to Singapore's growing freelance and remote-tech market

## Frequently Asked Questions

Do you have a local office in Singapore? +

No. School of Freelancing delivers all training and support online, worldwide — there's no local office anywhere, including Singapore.

What currency is training and support priced in for Singapore? +

Everything is priced and billed in USD regardless of your location, matching the prices shown on our training and support pages.

Can training be scheduled around time zones in Singapore? +

Yes. Live instructor-led sessions are scheduled flexibly to overlap with your local business hours.

How do I get started from Singapore? +

Message us on Telegram or WhatsApp to pick a training program or support service, and we'll confirm scheduling.
